notes: Reviewed metro, map, and compact menu UI batch.

entries.gt_0a8c5c9c636923: A platform without passengers is safer by the wall; near the track edge, steps are heard before the train is seen.
entries.gt_0d74df748008e3: A red board without a station name takes you down faster than back; on the second arrow click, it is better to wait.
entries.gt_0f19a2b6508134: Platform attendant: the white lamp leads only to the return path.
entries.gt_10adade8f42479: The board shows the living loop, but this platform is not boarding today.
entries.gt_1284ea19e992ce: Stranded passenger: the lift went down, and my ticket stayed invalid.
entries.gt_138db425e1a450: The driver says tiredly: red lower line; if you changed your mind, wait for the next click.
entries.gt_17f9177290f341: White lamps lead back to the four boards; count lamps, not announcements.
entries.gt_1fef6c50c1ca01: Liftman: a warm button means someone else has not finished their route.
entries.gt_29fd0443d70379: The yellow arrow points to the depot, but the shaft is closed and there is no return button.
entries.gt_2fe9f125376675: A black board opens someone else's vestibule; the white screen on the left leads back if you ignore the announcement.
entries.gt_33a33f327cf284: The black board clicks, but there is no boarding. Wait for the white screen.
entries.gt_37086357604281: Track attendant: the rails are not a walkway. Stand behind the yellow line.
entries.gt_3779fc78576d61: Driver: the red line saves minutes, but often drops you below the schedule.
entries.gt_3ce3e90e447fc8: The red board is lit, but the train does not take passengers here. The doors do not even pretend.
entries.gt_44b9c83fc56f22: Driver: the train takes the ticket, but check the platform number yourself.
entries.gt_474777cf4d176f: Depot attendant: where there are no rails, the white lamp matters more than the schedule.
entries.gt_480ac655bd6a63: The red lower line requires a metro ticket. Without it, the turnstile holds the door and calls the attendant.
entries.gt_5daf0563bcc036: Liftman: a cold button in a warm cabin means the lift is still carrying someone.
entries.gt_6344432b4659d6: The turnstile to the living loop asks for a ticket. Without a ticket, the green lamp only warms your fingers.
entries.gt_65921485a9509d: The ticket was punched by teeth. That kind sometimes passes if you do not show it to the light.
entries.gt_667b8654f87e5f: Passenger: count doors, not floors. Signs lie more often here.
entries.gt_67393e830e1ad7: The green board stays steady while the ticket is dry; the kitchen smell leads to the living loop.
entries.gt_6d88a353e03643: The red lower line named the station too early and dropped you at the wrong lift.
entries.gt_733cfe8f4e1c20: The station repeated - do not get off. Wait until the board names a different track number.
entries.gt_79994715713532: Stranded passenger: I was waiting not for the train, but for the right door sound.
entries.gt_7c34b0b884a8b2: Doors closing. Hands away, backpack close.
entries.gt_82333dca9d8885: If the station repeated, stay seated. Repeats often put you onto someone else's platform.
entries.gt_857e9829f2f4ca: Stranded passenger: the station repeated, so I sat on the floor and stayed alive.
entries.gt_8ab5907f0559a5: The train is empty not because it is safe. It has already dropped everyone off.
entries.gt_8c23ef78ca50e5: The yellow arrow clicked without rails and gave the route to someone else's vestibule.
entries.gt_8e936dbddd86cc: Attendant: a yellow arrow without a fuse leads to a depot with no return button.
entries.gt_8f60971988cdcd: The living loop smelled of someone else's kitchen and dropped you where it had not promised.
entries.gt_920e40a50d6b8d: Passenger in a scarf: keep the ticket in your fist; do not show it to the inspector early.
entries.gt_9691e234feefeb: Blind Transfer asks for a ticket. A coin does not pass; a tooth mark sometimes does.
entries.gt_978af2eb7c2dea: Attendant: listen to the first arrow click; on the second, move away from the edge.
entries.gt_9a14d0263c7b26: The white screen blinks from far away, but the return path does not work. Move closer to the screen.
entries.gt_9b71249f556c5a: Driver: the doors are closed; keep your documents inside too.
entries.gt_a47ad2bb47cb7f: Liftman: if the cabin will not take you back, find the button that has not cooled.
entries.gt_a786801f73a999: A warm lift button is someone else's recent route. Check the diagram before boarding.
entries.gt_b94bd57e909b7a: The white service loop took you without a ticket. Follow the white lamps back to Platform 19.
entries.gt_bc85bb66ba7c0c: Depot Without Rails takes the ticket as a receipt that you pressed the button yourself.
entries.gt_c44f6730ce3d34: Liftman: the cabin brought the smell of the lower floor and refused to go back.
entries.gt_c469d470eed068: Platform: if an empty train hisses through the vents, hide behind the kiosk and let it pass.
entries.gt_c47cc81e46ae1a: Do not leave the lift: the return ascent takes you back to the Collectors while the button is still warm.
entries.gt_c63fa75c3c94e1: The iodine smell after the Collectors means you can get out; return only by the first button.
entries.gt_ca900ea8909af5: Platform attendant: the green board is steady; board by the door and do not let go of the ticket.
entries.gt_cd253ab8e23f25: The white screen accepted the exit. Doors closing; return to the four boards.
entries.gt_d1405fec2dd90e: An ordinary lift on the neighboring floor will return you to the Collectors; check whether the button is warm.
entries.gt_d407dfdd0228ff: Passenger: if the station announced in your voice, do not be the first to get off.
entries.gt_d4965074ad88cd: The black board accepted boarding. The attendant turned away: those who watch the board more often get off in the wrong place.
entries.gt_de01a43368b1b3: Blind Transfer opened the doors before the announcement. Do not be first to get off.
entries.gt_e5eb683b52a93b: Depot attendant: the yellow arrow is open; keep to the wall, the white lamp will return you.
entries.gt_e7830df9080f73: The button is warm. Someone left recently or has not arrived yet.
entries.gt_eb0fdaf20bd398: If the train arrived empty and warm, step behind the kiosk counter and wait for the doors to open a second time.
entries.gt_f0c61fcd2cf1d3: The yellow arrow to the depot asks for a fuse for the return path; trust the white lamp, not the announcement.
entries.gt_f41883987b4217: Do not listen to the announcement: watch the white screen and return to the platform.
entries.gt_f5ae248459ad44: The white lamp is lit, but the passage is closed. Look for the lamp by the machine.
entries.gt_fc425fc6f121c0: Driver: you can wait under the sign; you cannot wait on the rails.
